text: There is a hum of intellectual activity all around me. Within the glass-walled room, the blue light casts a serene yet anticipatory mood on the people hunched over their laptops. Steps away, the R+D wall display envelops me in ideas: "Responsive and rapidly evolving," it declares. Words about the philosophical adventure of observing the everyday echo my own thoughts. Here, surrounded by innovation and inquiry, I feel both small and limitless—part of the conversation and also an observer, fueled by curiosity and wonder. I am quietly energized.
